query: SELECT pp.*, p.name as project_name FROM projectPhases pp JOIN projects p ON pp.project_id = p.id WHERE p.id = 4 OR p.name LIKE '%ند%' OR p.name LIKE '%Nad%' ORDER BY pp.id LIMIT 20;
